nasb.text: The money from the guilt offerings and the money from the sin offerings was not brought into the house of the Lord; it was for the priests.

esv.text: The money from the guilt offerings and the money from the sin offerings was not brought into the house of the Lord; it belonged to the priests.

cnv.text: 但是贖愆祭和贖罪祭的銀子，他們沒有奉入耶和華的殿，這些銀子是屬於祭司的。

ccb.text: 赎过祭和赎罪祭的银子没有带到耶和华的殿里，而是归给祭司。
